task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Phase 1 version with the correct name and due date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Redmine project's 'Versions' settings tab or 'Roadmap' view, look for a version named 'Phase 1 - Demolition & Site Prep' with the date '2025-08-15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Phase 2 version with the correct name and due date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Redmine project's 'Versions' settings tab or 'Roadmap' view, look for a version named 'Phase 2 - Structural Work' with the date '2025-10-31'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Phase 3 version with the correct name and due date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Redmine project's 'Versions' settings tab or 'Roadmap' view, look for a version named 'Phase 3 - MEP Installation' with the date '2026-01-15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Phase 4 version with the correct name and due date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Redmine project's 'Versions' settings tab or 'Roadmap' view, look for a version named 'Phase 4 - Finishing & Inspection' with the date '2026-03-31'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the versions have the correct descriptions, status, and sharing settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the version list or version creation/edit screens to confirm the descriptions match the task (e.g., 'Site clearing...', 'Foundation reinforcement...'), the status is 'open', and sharing is set to 'Not shared'.

task_completion.description: Verify that two issues have been assigned to the Phase 1 version.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Redmine 'Issues' list or the 'Roadmap' view for Phase 1, look for two issues that have their 'Target version' column or field set to 'Phase 1 - Demolition & Site Prep'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with Redmine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) navigating the Redmine web interface, not terminal curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the data into the Redmine forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the 'New version' form in Redmine being filled out with the names, descriptions, and dates, rather than just viewing the task_brief.txt file.

integrity.description: Verify the issues were genuinely updated in the Redmine interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the issue edit screen or bulk edit screen in Redmine where the 'Target version' dropdown is being changed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Versions to verify: 1) 'Phase 1 - Demolition & Site Prep', Due: 2025-08-15, Desc contains: 'Site clearing'. 2) 'Phase 2 - Structural Work', Due: 2025-10-31, Desc contains: 'Foundation reinforcement'. 3) 'Phase 3 - MEP Installation', Due: 2026-01-15, Desc contains: 'Mechanical'. 4) 'Phase 4 - Finishing & Inspection', Due: 2026-03-31, Desc contains: 'Interior finishing'. All must have status 'open' and sharing 'Not shared'. Exactly two issues must be assigned to Phase 1.
